display.purpose: Page-level dashboard or major workspace headings only.

headline.purpose: Panel headings and major workflow sections.

title.purpose: Cards, rows, tabs, and task titles.

body.purpose: Explanatory copy, review details, and longer user-facing descriptions.

label.purpose: Metadata labels, status captions, navigation descriptions, and workflow markers.

shadows.name: panel
shadows.purpose: Major panels only when separation from the background is needed.

motion.name: motion-fast
motion.purpose: Button, border, color, and focus transitions.

motion.name: motion-medium
motion.purpose: Panel entry and queue item reveal.

motion.name: motion-slow
motion.purpose: Reserved for slow state changes, not default UI choreography.

narrative.overview:
JobDesk is a focused career workspace for turning raw career material into evidence-backed decisions. The visual system should feel precise, trustworthy, and career-serious: a calm place to inspect source material, review claims, approve public-safe wording, and create application assets without theatrical AI behavior.

The product uses a dark, restrained working surface with blue as the primary signal color. Its panels, rows, tabs, and workflow states should support concentration and review rather than spectacle. The interface can be information-rich, but it should help the user focus on one decision at a time.

JobDesk explicitly rejects generic AI resume chatbot styling, flashy SaaS landing-page treatment, gamified productivity patterns, and dense engineering-console language. The design should expose workflow state, evidence readiness, and next actions in user-facing terms.
keyCharacteristics: Dark workspace surfaces with restrained Signal Blue emphasis.
Translucent panels and 1px borders used for structure, not decoration.
Compact but readable typography with strong labels and tabular metrics.
Clear status language for evidence, review, readiness, risk, and verification.

rules.name: The Signal Rarity Rule
rules.body: Signal Blue should identify current action, selection, and confidence. Do not let it become decoration across every card.

rules.name: The Evidence State Rule
rules.body: Review Amber, Verified Green, and Risk Red are semantic colors. Never use them just to add variety.

rules.name: The No Chatbot Glow Rule
rules.body: Do not add neon, purple, cyan, or gradient-heavy AI styling. JobDesk is an evidence workspace, not a generic AI assistant shell.

rules.name: The Product-Scale Rule
rules.body: Use compact fixed sizes for working surfaces. Avoid oversized hero typography except on the highest-level dashboard context.

rules.name: The User-Language Rule
rules.body: Labels should say what the user can act on: Evidence Claim, Work Experience, Story Target, Review, Resume-ready. Do not surface provider, schema, retry, or workflow-run language in normal UI.

rules.name: The Flat Review Row Rule
rules.body: Rows, evidence cards, and queue items should use borders and tonal fills before shadows. A shadow means elevation or focus, not default decoration.

rules.name: The Popover Depth Rule
rules.body: Stronger shadows belong to menus, sticky navigation, and transient overlays where spatial layering helps orientation.

dos: Do use `Deep Workspace Black`, translucent panel bases, and 1px lines to create a calm working environment.
Do reserve `Signal Blue` for primary actions, current selection, focused workflow steps, and active review state.
Do use `Review Amber`, `Verified Green`, and `Risk Red` only for real semantic states.
Do keep controls focused, explicit, and review-first: one primary decision per local surface whenever possible.
Do keep WCAG AA contrast for body text, labels, inputs, buttons, and placeholder text.
Do keep reduced-motion behavior for every animation and use motion to show state, loading, or focus.
Do use user-facing career language such as Evidence Claim, Work Experience, Story Target, Resume-ready, and Review.
donts: Don't make JobDesk feel like a generic AI resume chatbot.
Don't use flashy SaaS landing-page composition, hero-metric templates, or marketing-style decorative sections inside the app.
Don't make the product feel like a gamified productivity app. Progress indicators should clarify work, not chase streaks or points.

Don't make the workspace feel like a dense engineering console. Avoid exposing provider names, retry counts, schema labels, sourceMode, DTO, workflow-run, or debug concepts as primary user-facing language.
Don't use neon AI glow, purple gradients, cyan-on-dark AI tropes, gradient text, glassmorphism, or decorative bokeh/orbs.
Don't nest cards inside cards. Use flat bands, rows, tables, and clear dividers for grouped work.
Don't use side-stripe borders as accent decoration. Use full borders, semantic chips, or clear row state instead.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action for local workflow decisions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #367dff, #93bdff); color: #071018; border: 0; border-radius: 9px; font-family: Aptos, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 880; padding: 10px 14px; min-height: 38px; transition: background-color 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease, color 180ms ease, opacity 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px) scale(0.985); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(79, 140, 255, 0.34); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary Row Button
components.description: Compact action inside rows, queues, and panels.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: rgba(79, 140, 255, 0.13); color: #9ec3ff; border: 1px solid rgba(79, 140, 255, 0.28); border-radius: 999px; font-family: Aptos, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 860; padding: 8px 12px; transition: background-color 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease, color 180ms ease, opacity 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(79, 140, 255, 0.18); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(79, 140, 255, 0.34); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Top Navigation Item
components.description: Primary app-shell navigation item with active state.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { align-items: center; background: transparent; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 14px; color: #8b96aa; display: inline-flex; justify-content: center; min-width: 118px; padding: 9px 11px; font-family: Aptos, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-item span { color: inherit; font-size: 0.86rem; font-weight: 780; letter-spacing: -0.01em; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-nav-item:hover, .ds-nav-item[data-active='true'] { background: rgba(79, 140, 255, 0.13); border-color: rgba(79, 140, 255, 0.22); color: #f4f7ff; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.08); } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(79, 140, 255, 0.34); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Workspace Panel
components.description: Major workspace panel for task sections and dashboard lanes.
components.html:
Evidence Library

Review reusable material

Check source-backed claims, public-safe wording, and resume readiness.
components.css: .ds-panel { background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.045), rgba(255,255,255,0.018)), rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.78); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.09); border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 16px 44px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); color: #f4f7ff; display: grid; gap: 8px; padding: 18px; font-family: Aptos, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-panel-kicker { color: #9ec3ff; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.055em; margin: 0; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-panel h2 { color: #f4f7ff; font-size: clamp(1.35rem, 2.1vw, 1.8rem); font-weight: 880; letter-spacing: -0.035em; line-height: 1.08; margin: 0; } .ds-panel p { color: #8b96aa; font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.55; margin: 0; }

components.name: Review Row
components.description: Focused row for one evidence, resume, or queue decision.
components.html:
Needs review
Public-safe summary missing

Add safe wording before this claim can be used in a resume.
components.css: .ds-review-row { align-items: center; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.018); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.075); border-radius: 8px; color: #f4f7ff; display: grid; gap: 12px; grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0,1fr) auto; padding: 12px 14px; font-family: Aptos, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-review-row > span { background: rgba(243,199,117,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(243,199,117,0.24); border-radius: 999px; color: #f3c775; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 850; padding: 6px 8px; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-review-row strong { color: #f4f7ff; display: block; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 780; margin-bottom: 3px; } .ds-review-row p { color: #8b96aa; font-size: 0.78rem; line-height: 1.38; margin: 0; } .ds-review-row button { background: rgba(79,140,255,0.13); border: 1px solid rgba(79,140,255,0.28); border-radius: 6px; color: #9ec3ff; font-size: 0.76rem; font-weight: 860; padding: 7px 10px; } .ds-review-row button:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(79,140,255,0.34); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Dark inset field for text, search, select, and textarea inputs.
components.css: .ds-field { color: #8b96aa; display: grid; font-family: Aptos, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.74rem; font-weight: 760; gap: 6px; } .ds-field input { background: rgba(8,12,20,0.72); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.09); border-radius: 8px; color: #f4f7ff; font: inherit; font-size: 0.84rem; font-weight: 500; min-height: 38px; padding: 8px 10px; } .ds-field input::placeholder { color: #8b96aa; } .ds-field input:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(79,140,255,0.34); outline-offset: 3px; border-color: rgba(79,140,255,0.42); }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Semantic status marker for review, ready, risk, and active states.
components.css: .ds-chip { align-items: center; background: rgba(79,140,255,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(79,140,255,0.28); border-radius: 999px; color: #9ec3ff; display: inline-flex; font-family: Aptos, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 850; line-height: 1; padding: 6px 10px; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-chip[data-state='review'] { background: rgba(243,199,117,0.12); border-color: rgba(243,199,117,0.24); color: #f3c775; } .ds-chip[data-state='ready'] { background: rgba(125,223,179,0.12); border-color: rgba(125,223,179,0.24); color: #7ddfb3; } .ds-chip[data-state='risk'] { background: rgba(255,127,141,0.12); border-color: rgba(255,127,141,0.24); color: #ff7f8d; }

components.name: Workflow Stepper
components.css: .ds-stepper { display: grid; gap: 8px; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; font-family: Aptos, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-stepper li { color: #8b96aa; display: grid; gap: 5px; grid-template-columns: auto 1fr; min-width: 0; position: relative; } .ds-stepper span { align-items: center; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.09); border-radius: 999px; color: #c8d2e6; display: inline-flex; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 760; height: 26px; justify-content: center; width: 26px; } .ds-stepper b { color: #c8d2e6; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 760; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-stepper strong { color: #f4f7ff; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 720; grid-column: 2; } .ds-stepper li[data-state='active'] span, .ds-stepper li[data-state='complete'] span { background: rgba(79,140,255,0.15); border-color: rgba(158,195,255,0.36); color: #9ec3ff; } .ds-stepper li[data-state='blocked'] span { background: rgba(243,199,117,0.12); border-color: rgba(243,199,117,0.34); color: #f3c775; }
